summary: The branch satisfies the substantive WebSocket removal and Railway readiness requirements in the diff. I could not run the full gate in this read-only sandbox because Vitest tries to write Vite temp files under `client/node_modules/.vite-temp`; the standalone port unit test passed.

findings.title: Stale WebSocket comment after removal
findings.claim: The branch removes the server WebSocket from `server/src/index.js`, but this comment still says WebSocket code lives there. That leaves misleading implementation guidance in a file touched by this cleanup.
findings.suggestion: Update the comment to describe only that `createApp()` builds the Express app without starting a listener.

findings.title: Comment points at deleted sharedState module
findings.claim: This branch deletes `client/src/lib/sharedState.js`, but this privacy comment still says to see that file for the sanitized shared state path. Future readers following the reference will hit a deleted module.
findings.suggestion: Reword the comment to reference the current Zoom message/overlay payload path, or remove the file-specific reference.
